hero.title: Make the Web Accessible for Everyone
hero.subtitle: Scan any website for accessibility issues, get clear explanations, and receive ready-to-use fix snippets — powered by axe-core and AI.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit for web accessibility auditing

scanner.title: Smart Scanner
scanner.desc: Powered by axe-core, the industry-standard accessibility testing engine. Detects 80+ types of WCAG violations with zero false positives.

explanations.title: AI Explanations
explanations.desc: Every violation comes with a clear, human-readable explanation of what's wrong, who it affects, and exactly how to fix it.

snippets.title: Fix Snippets
snippets.desc: Copy-paste ready code corrections for each violation. See the before and after side by side — no guesswork needed.

bookmarklet.title: Bookmarklet
bookmarklet.desc: One-click browser tool. Drag it to your bookmarks bar and scan any page instantly without installing anything.

cli.title: CLI Tool
cli.desc: Automate accessibility scans in your CI/CD pipeline. Scan single URLs or batch process entire sitemaps.

reports.title: Beautiful Reports
reports.desc: Generate professional HTML, JSON, or Markdown reports with severity scoring, WCAG mapping, and exportable data.

demo.title: Live Demo
demo.subtitle: See real accessibility reports from sample websites
demo.noViolations: No violations found — this page passes all checks!

install.title: Get Started in Seconds
install.subtitle: Choose the tool that fits your workflow

bookmarklet.title: Bookmarklet
bookmarklet.desc: Drag this button to your bookmarks bar:
bookmarklet.instructions: Then click it on any website to run an instant accessibility scan.
bookmarklet.step1: Drag the button above to your bookmarks bar
bookmarklet.step2: Navigate to any website you want to test
bookmarklet.step3: Click the bookmarklet to scan the page

footer.desc: Open source web accessibility assistant. Making the web usable for everyone.
